'''yaruchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iaido|iaido]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iaido|iaido]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yaruchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yærichith|yærichith]] || [[word:yærichij|yærichij]] || [[word:yærichish|yærichish]] || [[word:yærichi|yærichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yaruruchuth|yaruruchuth]] || [[word:yaruruchuj|yaruruchuj]] || [[word:yaruruchush|yaruruchush]] || [[word:yaruruchu|yaruruchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yaruchuth|yaruchuth]] || [[word:yaruchuj|yaruchuj]] || [[word:yaruchush|yaruchush]] || [[word:yaruchu|yaruchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yarufchufth|yarufchufth]] || [[word:yarufchufj|yarufchufj]] || [[word:yarufchufsh|yarufchufsh]] || [[word:yarufchuf|yarufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yaruchuthu|yaruchuthu]] || [[word:yaruchuju|yaruchuju]] || [[word:yaruchushu|yaruchushu]] || [[word:yaruchuku|yaruchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yaruchuth|yaruchuth]] || [[word:yaruchuj|yaruchuj]] || [[word:yaruchush|yaruchush]] || [[word:yaruchu|yaruchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yaruchuthul|yaruchuthul]] || [[word:yaruchujul|yaruchujul]] || [[word:yaruchushul|yaruchushul]] || [[word:yaruchukul|yaruchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yaruchuuthuthu|yaruchuuthuthu]] || [[word:yaruchuujuju|yaruchuujuju]] || [[word:yaruchuushushu|yaruchuushushu]] || [[word:yaruchuuku|yaruchuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yaruchuthun|yaruchuthun]] || [[word:yaruchujun|yaruchujun]] || [[word:yaruchushun|yaruchushun]] || [[word:yaruchukun|yaruchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yaruchuthuoro|yaruchuthuoro]] || [[word:yaruchujuoro|yaruchujuoro]] || [[word:yaruchushuoro|yaruchushuoro]] || [[word:yaruchukuoro|yaruchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
